jurisdiction_name: Benton Carroll Salem Local Sd (Ottawa Co.)
narrative:
Benton Carroll Salem Local Sd school district has 7,254 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a clear Republican lean of 9.1 percentage points.
